repos.name: RCI-Frontend
repos.description:
**RCI-Frontend - Internal Political Radio Advertising Management Tool**

This project focuses on building an internal tool to manage political radio advertising rates across 1900+ stations with advanced filtering, QA workflows, and rate management capabilities. Utilizing the Manus framework, it incorporates data migration (MySQL -> SQLite), systemd service integration, NGINX config updates, deployment configs,  and comprehensive documentation – including a detailed DDL export of all tables.
The repository utilizes TypeScript, integrating with robust testing via GitHub Auth & Workflow, focusing on station-level coverage and rate optimization. Significant milestones include: Migrating database to SQLite for self-contained local deployment; Implementing PrecisionTrak Bulk Airtable cleanup; Integrating Tier 2 features (including spot scaling, strategic feature additions);  Refactoring of the proposal builder interface; Fixing network tagging bugs; API limit audit and fix; and comprehensive coverage map issue resolution. The project heavily emphasizes best practices like data migration, testing integration points and documentation.

repos.name: cbuserguide
repos.description:
**Automated User Guide Generator for Campaign Brain Web Applications**

The repository `cbuserguide` is developed by CBUserGuide to automatically generate user guides for the Campaign Brain web applications. It employs Python and utilizes a GitHub workflow system, frequently incorporating code updates and bug fixes. Recent commits focus on improving the generator’s functionality through regular updates, maintenance of documentation and configuration, and enhancing the overall codebase.

The repository includes features such as regenerate cbcli-reference (weekly), add 2026-06-06 maintenance reports & new documentation sections, automate dependency management with `chore` commands like dropping unused packages and pruning dependencies to enhance code cleanliness.  The team also performs regular commits to ensure the project’s stability via a schedule of actions and updates.
